programs.title: Southern Law
programs.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: A chase ensues in Tallahassee, while in Volusia County officers are hot on the trail of two vehicles suspected to be stolen; in Lawrence, an argument over a chicken sandwich ends with a speeding stop and a DUI arrest.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: In Berkeley, a vehicle pursuit turns into a foot chase with K9 Dixie leading the charge; in Pomona, officers confront an individual armed with a bolt cutter; in Richland, a stash of drugs, guns and cash is revealed.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: Counterfeit bills turn up in Tulsa; a pat down in Alabama turns into a treasure hunt when officers discover pants packed with weed and socks lined with money; in Florida, cinnamon whiskey fuels a bizarre scene.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: In South Carolina, a field test reveals the truth behind a baggie of powder; in Jefferson County, a high-speed chase turns into a foot pursuit where neighbors pitch in to help; in East Providence, a roadside stop uncovers a messy situation.

programs.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programs.desc: In Jefferson County, a traffic stop turns dangerous; in Tulsa, officers pull over a suspected stolen vehicle; in Missoula, police search for a rider on horseback accused of rustling cattle.
